title: vernonia obtusa var. bartlettii
intro: Vernonia obtusa var. bartlettii, also known as the Bartlett's ironweed, is a variety of the Vernonia obtusa plant, a flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and as a purgative. The health benefits of Vernonia obtusa var. bartlettii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent the formation of blood clots. Vernonia obtusa var. bartlettii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
